_comment: RDMA Python Image Pipeline — Node 0 (loader / sender).  Run on machine 0.
_comment2: Mirrors rdma_img_pipeline_node0.json but uses PyPipeline with img_load_ppm_binary.
_comment3: The Python guest uses read_next_io_record (cursor-based) to consume one PPM per round.

nodes._comment: ─── Pre-load all 3 binary PPMs into I/O slot 10 (one record per image) ──────
─── 3-round PyPipeline: decode one PPM per round → stream slot 20 ──────────
nodes._comment2: img_load_ppm_binary reads the next record from I/O slot 10 each round,
nodes._comment3: writes decoded pixels to stream slot 20, then RDMA-sends slot 20 to node 1.
nodes._comment4: free_after=true clears slot 20 after each send so the next round starts fresh.
